name: playwright-healer
description: Heal failing Playwright tests via Copilot agent mode with live screencast

languageModelTools.name: playwright-healer_execute_cli
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Run a playwright-cli command (snapshot, screenshot, click, fill, run-code, etc.) against the connected browser. Returns stdout with parsed fields (pageUrl, snapshotFile, screenshotFile, generatedCode).

command.description: The full playwright-cli command to run, e.g. 'snapshot', 'click e3', 'screenshot', 'run-code "async page => { ... }"'

languageModelTools.name: playwright-healer_resolve_definition
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Use LSP go-to-definition to find where a selector or symbol is defined (e.g. in a POM file). Returns the definition file URI, line number, and source code.

languageModelTools.name: playwright-healer_find_references
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Use LSP find-references to locate every file that uses a given selector or symbol. Returns an array of reference locations with file URI, line, and line text.

languageModelTools.name: playwright-healer_get_type_info
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Use LSP hover to get type information for a symbol (e.g. Locator, FrameLocator, Page). Helps determine the correct replacement method.

languageModelTools.name: playwright-healer_apply_edit
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Apply a text replacement across one or more files using workspace.applyEdit. Supports undo. Use this to fix selectors in POM files and test files.

oldText.description: Text to find on the line
